description: A captured signal shows a phantom low-frequency tone that does not exist in the source because the input was undersampled.
body: Failure mode: content above half the sample rate folds into the baseband and appears as a believable but false tone. Detection signals: a tone whose frequency moves when the sample rate changes, energy that vanishes when the analog bandwidth is reduced, and a spectrum inconsistent with the known source. Do not trust the captured data while an out-of-band path exists. Safer fallback: raise the sample rate above twice the maximum content or insert an analog anti-alias filter before the converter.
